title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin presents a multi-model workflow that routes planning and reasoning to Claude Opus while delegating UI design and implementation to Gemini 3.5 Flash. The approach uses handoff documents and specialized coding agents to compose complementary model strengths for full-stack frontend development.
